name: AccessRightParameterAssignment
description: The assignment of a fare parameter (referring to geography, time, quality or usage) to an element of a fare system (access right, validated access, control mean, etc.).

name: ValidityParameterAssignment
description: An ACCESS RIGHT PARAMETER ASSIGNMENT relating a fare collection parameter to a theoretical FARE PRODUCT (or one of its components) or a SALES OFFER PACKAGE.

name: GenericParameterAssignment
description: A VALIDITY PARAMETER ASSIGNMENT specifying practical parameters during a TRAVEL GenericATION, within a given fare structure (e.g. the origin or destination zone in a zone-counting system).

name: GenericParameterAssignmentInContext
description: Optimisation: Can be used without id constraintA VALIDITY PARAMETER ASSIGNMENT specifying practical parameters during a TRAVEL GenericATION, within a given fare structure (e.g. the origin or destination zone in a zone-counting system).

name: TypeOfAccessRightAssignment
description: A classification of ACCESS RIGHT ASSIGNMENTs expressing their general functionalities and local functional characteristics specific to the operator. Types of ACCESS RIGHT ASSIGNMENTs like e.g. throw-away ticket, throw-away ticket unit, value card, electronic purse allowing access, public transport credit card etc. may be used to define these categories.

name: PricingParameterSet
description: Parameters  governing the calculation of fares.

name: PriceUnit
description: A unit to express prices: amount of currency, abstract fare unit, ticket unit or token etc.

attributes.name: Precision
attributes.description: Precision to use for units.

name: Rounding
description: Parameters describing how the results of calculations are to be rounded to the nearest quantum.

name: RoundingStep
description: A rounding step to use to round a range of values. Any value larger than the step key and smaller tha the next step key should be rounded to this value.

name: FareDayType
description: A type of day used in the fare collection domain, characterized by one or more properties which affect the definition of access rights and prices in the fare system.

name: MonthValidityOffset
description: Days before (negative) or after (positive)  the start of the month that a product with a calendar period driven activation becomes valid.

name: PricingRule
description: Parameters describing how a fare is to be computed.

name: DiscountingRule
description: A price for which a discount can be offered.

name: LimitingRule
description: A price for which a discount can be offered.

name: LimitingRuleInContext
description: OPTIMISED version whcih can be be used only in line assues ID of comtainign context  -no  id checking. A price for which a discount can be offered.

name: TypeOfPricingRule
description: Classification of pricing rule. Can be used for VAT categories, etc.  +v1.1

attributes.name: TaxCategory
attributes.description: Tax category associated with pricing rule.

name: PricingService
description: A web service used to provide prices dynamically at time of booking or purchase.

name: GroupOfDistanceMatrixElements
description: A group of DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENTs; may set common properties for a given set of origin and destination pairs.

attributes.name: UseToExclude
attributes.description: Whether contents of Group should be used to exclude (true) from a large list . The default is include  (i.e.false)

attributes.name: Distance
attributes.description: GROUP OF DISTANCE MATRIX ELEMENTs to use when advertising Train -If different from Id.
